race.comment: GOLDEN MAGNATE (2) finds a suitable race. He won in fast time on debut at Moe and has been okay in two runs since against handy opposition, getting back on heavy ground at Sale last time. This looks a nice race for him and he draws for every chance. PRINCESS SAKIKO (6) resumes having gone to the paddock a maiden winner at Terang. She's expected to improve this time around and can measure straight up. SALIZOU (7) was okay first up at Pakenham behind a handy one in Barari who has gone on with it since. She's been given a freshen since then and has plenty of upside, respecting. ENDLESS SUMMER (1) is off a let-up since running at Randwick Kensington in April. He's a former Japanese gelding who creates interest down in grade. QUEEN CHRISTINE (9) next best.
